sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5198" key="a)metapoi/htos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμετα-ποίητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n5198.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">indigestible,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1009.tlg001:42" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Xenocr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">42</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
